description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docker images build and push that allows manual dispatch. The workflow consists of two jobs: obtain-dockerfiles and build-and-push. The obtain-dockerfiles job runs on a self-hosted Linux environment, checks out the develop branch, and uploads the dockerfiles to be used as artifacts. The build-and-push job, which depends on obtain-dockerfiles, runs on the same environment, downloads the dockerfiles, sets up QEMU and Docker Buildx, logs in to the GitHub Container Registry, and builds and pushes a Docker image using the bake action.
